title: Recruits Upgrades
description: Adds an emerald-based upgrade system to the Recruits mod that lets you significantly expand claims max chunks
body:
# Recruits Upgrades

With this mod you can upgrade the maximum claim size of your faction from the Recruits mod using emeralds. It adds 5 upgrade levels that let you expand your territory from the default 50 chunks all the way up to 100 chunks.

## Main features

- 5 upgrade levels with increasing emerald costs
- Fully customizable (level names, emerald prices and maximum chunks per level)
- Nice in-game configuration menu via Cloth Config
